Strawberry Yogurt Bites

author: Janet Caldwell

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield:

Ingredients

3 ( 8oz ) containers strawberry yogurt 1 pkg ( 3 oz ) JELL-O Strawberry flavor gelatin 8 fresh strawberries

Directions

Mix yogurt and dry gelatin in microwaveable bowl. Microwave on HIGH 5 min or until gelatin is completely dissolved, stirring every 2 min. Spoon into 16 paper lined mini muffin cups. Refrigerate 1 hour or until firm. Remove from liners, top with strawberries.
